descriptionCollect 10 bionic implants that is going to be used for research.

tableMissionTypes
value10
minLvl0
completeDescriptionAgent ace: “Hmm… that took a long time, but at least you’re still alive. I was afraid we had lost yet another pilot. The bionic implants are extremely important and we thank you for the effort. As a reward, take these resources and invest them wisely in upgrades. There also a few spare artifacts in the armory. You will need it!”

availableYes
